biological_replicate: we expressed stably in Flp-In TREx 293 cells
technical_replicate: Each compound promoted an increase in binding of [35S]GTPγS in a concentration-dependent fashion
experimental_design: agonist comparison (2-HTP vs 6-OAU vs DL-175 vs PSB-16671)
we selected a pair of orthosteric agonists, 2-HTP and 6-OAU
factor_value: we selected a pair of orthosteric agonists, 2-HTP and 6-OAU, as well as the allosteric activator PSB-16671
number_of_biological_replicates: Flp-In TREx 293 cells and CHO-K1 cells
